name: Red Ant Queen
description: A unique queen deep inside the lower-yard anthill. She is not a traditional combat creature, but an interactive event whose outcome depends on the sandwich you offer her.
behavior: She waits in the heart of the anthill and only reacts when the player chooses an offering. Each decision locks in a permanent route for that save or NG+ cycle.
interactionWithPlayer: The player can feed her a yummy, poisoned, or infected Mushroom Sandwich. Each variant locks out the others and permanently changes the queen, her loot, and the future of the anthill.
interactionWithCreatures: As long as she lives, she directs the red ants in the colony. Depending on the route, some become neutral with Antbassador or end up replaced by infected variants in NG+.
strategy: The decision matters more than combat. The juicy route favors the pet and Antbassador, the poisoned route opens the full corpse loot, and the infected route prepares the altered anthill for New Game+.
specialTraits: Juicy route: grants a Baby Red Ant, its gold card, and Antbassador progress; red soldier ants also become temporarily neutral while the mutation is equipped.
Poisoned route: kills the queen, lets you loot the body, and opens the cave behind her with brittle quartzite, NG+ chests, and an extra anthill exit.
Infected route: initially mirrors the poisoned route, but in the next New Game+ it turns this queen into an Infected Ant Queen and replaces part of the colony with infected ants.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Not a traditional combat encounter; it functions as an interactive choice event.
